report.title: Report or contact us
report.subtitle: Cheaters, toxic behaviour, bugs or any question. It goes straight to the staff.
report.detailsPlaceholder: Tell us what happened, with details and evidence if you have it…
report.success: Got it! The staff will review it soon.
report.error: Something failed. Try again or use the Discord.

meta.description: Spanish DayZ server on Livonia. Vanilla+ first person, 100% PvP, with a unique end-game Run, a key system and a community that never gives up.
meta.keywords: DayZ,DayZ server,Black Legend,Spanish DayZ,DayZ Livonia,DayZ PvP server,Vanilla 1PP,survival

hero.subtitle: The server that takes you to a unique DayZ experience. Survive, conquer the map and

chapters.title: The world fell
chapters.text: The infection wiped out everything in a matter of days. Cities burned, governments collapsed and civilization became a distant memory buried under the rubble.

chapters.title: Livonia shows no mercy
chapters.text: Endless forests, ghost towns and other survivors willing to do anything for one more bullet. Hunger, cold and betrayal hunt down anyone who lets their guard slip. There are no second chances.

chapters.title: Legends are reborn
chapters.text: But from the fire, something new always rises. Like the phoenix, those who survive rise stronger. This is your story. This is Black Legend.

features.subtitle: Every detail is designed to make the experience intense, fair and memorable. This is what awaits you inside.

items.title: Vanilla+ · 1PP
items.text: Enhanced vanilla experience in first person. No pay-to-win: here you win by skill.

items.title: 100% PvP
items.text: Livonia is a compact map where combat is guaranteed. If you're after action, you've got it.

items.title: The Livonia Run
items.text: A unique end-game: bunkers, access cards and exclusive weapons (AWM, GALIL, M79).

items.title: Active anti-cheat
items.text: VPPAdminTools and a staff watching 24/7. Cheats or bug abuse = permanent ban.

items.title: Spanish community
items.text: Hundreds of survivors on Discord. Clans, alliances, betrayals… and good vibes.

items.title: Enhanced base-building
items.text: Building addon, Building Fortifications and MMG Base Storage for bases done right.

steps.title: Join the Discord
steps.text: Come into the community, introduce yourself and stay on top of wipes, events and rules.

steps.title: Own DayZ on Steam
steps.text: You need the base game. Black Legend is a Vanilla+ experience in first person.

steps.title: Copy the IP and connect
steps.text: In DayZ, go to community servers and search by IP address. Paste ours and jump in.

steps.title: Install the mods and survive
steps.text: The mods download automatically when you connect. Create your character and start writing your legend.

maps.description: Black Legend's current map. More compact than Chernarus, with small towns close together: interaction and PvP are guaranteed. Plenty of forest to hide your base… or to ambush.

tiers.name: Tier 1
tiers.text: Green zone. Basic loot to gear up and start surviving.

tiers.name: Tier 2
tiers.text: Blue zone. Mid-tier gear and decent weapons; more player traffic.

tiers.name: Tier 3
tiers.text: Yellow zone. The best military loot on the map, with higher combat risk.

tiers.label: Ú
tiers.name: Unique Tier
tiers.text: Special purple zones scattered across the map: where you'll find the explosives you need to raid.

clips.subtitle: Trailers and server moments, straight from our YouTube.

events.subtitle: Wipes, base contests and the end-game Run. Content that keeps evolving while always staying true to vanilla.

items.name: Wipe + Livonia
items.description: The server moved to Livonia: a smaller, 100% PvP map. Every wipe means starting from scratch and rewriting your legend.

items.name: Base contest
items.description: Submit your base via ticket. The top 3 earn a custom TAG color in chat. Aesthetics and building are what count.

items.name: The Livonia Run
items.description: Reach the final bunker with the punched card and the white card to claim the server's most coveted weapons.

items.a: Yes. The server is and will always be free. You only need to own DayZ on Steam.

items.q: Do I need to install mods?
items.a: A few, and they download automatically the first time you connect. You don't have to do anything manually.

items.q: Which map is it played on?
items.a: On Livonia: a compact, 100% PvP map where interaction and combat are guaranteed.
Never. Donations are voluntary and grant no item or advantage in the game.
The server's end-game: a route through bunkers and keys to claim the most coveted weapons (AWM, GALIL, M79). The full guide is in the Wiki.
Only during raid hours, published in the Rules section. Outside that window it's forbidden.

items.q: Is it played in first person?
items.a: Yes, the server is 1PP only (first person). More hardcore, fairer and more competitive.

join.fallback: Join hundreds of survivors. The map waits for no one.

footer.tagline: The server that takes you to a unique DayZ experience. A project by the Spanish DayZ community. Survive, conquer and rise from the ashes.
footer.disclaimer: Not affiliated with Bohemia Interactive. DayZ is a trademark of its respective owners.

share.text: 🔥 Black Legend DayZ — Spanish DayZ server on Livonia. Join us!

notFound.title: You're lost in Livonia
notFound.text: This zone isn't on the map… or it's already been raided. Get back to familiar ground before nightfall.

about.subtitle: Black Legend was born from the idea that DayZ could be fairer, more intense and more human. This is our story and what drives us.
about.p1: We started as a handful of survivors tired of pay-to-win servers, full of cheaters and soulless. We wanted something different: a place where surviving meant something, where every bullet counted and every alliance mattered.
about.p2mid: : a compact, 100% PvP map where every match is a war. Vanilla+ in first person, with an
about.p2post: that has become legendary. But the spirit is still the same as day one.
about.quote: “It doesn't matter how many times you fall. It matters how many times you rise.”

pillars.title: Real immersion
pillars.text: No arcade shortcuts. Here realism rules: temperature management, diseases, hunger and the constant threat of other players.

pillars.title: Community above all
pillars.text: A close-knit staff, transparent decisions and a Spanish community years in the making. Your voice counts.

pillars.title: Constant content
pillars.text: Weekly events, rotating maps and continuous improvements. The server evolves with you, never stands still.

about.modsText: A carefully chosen set of mods that enriches the experience without breaking the vanilla balance. They download automatically when you connect.
about.modsNote: Click a mod to view it on the Steam Workshop

donations.subtitle: Black Legend is and will always be free. If you fancy lending a hand to cover the server's costs, every bit helps — entirely voluntary and with nothing expected in return.
donations.cardText: Donations are 100% voluntary and grant no item, role or advantage in the game. They go entirely to keeping the server alive: hosting, mods and improvements.
donations.donateNote: Message us on Discord and we'll tell you how
donations.transpText: We promise it and we keep it: donating gives you absolutely nothing in-game. Whoever wins, wins by skill. Donating is just a way to support the project if you want to and can.

cards.d: Zero items, roles or combat advantage. No donation benefits you in-game.
Every contribution goes to hosting, mods and improvements. Nothing else.
The server is free for everyone, always. Donating is entirely optional.
Only donate what you can spare. Your wellbeing comes first — it's just a game.

donations.voteTitle: Can't donate? Support us for free
donations.voteText: Vote for the server every day on Top-Games. It's free, takes 10 seconds and helps us grow and reach more survivors.

rules.subtitle: A few clear rules keep the server fair and fun for everyone. Connecting means knowing and accepting them.
rules.noticePre: These rules are a baseline and may be expanded or adjusted. The current, definitive version is always the one posted on the
rules.noticePost: . If in doubt, open a ticket.

groups.title: General rules
rules: Using cheats or abusing bugs/exploits = PERMANENT BAN.
We offer no compensation for the loss of your life, gear or vehicle.
Vehicle use is at your own risk. No vehicle support is provided.
Stream sniping is forbidden: PERMANENT BAN if there's evidence.

groups.title: Raiding rules
rules: You can't log out inside a base you've just raided: finish the raid and leave the base.
A base with no codelock for more than 3 days is considered abandoned.
Placing codelocks on a raided base is strictly forbidden.
Boosting between players is allowed; using campfires to boost is NOT allowed.
Dismantling other bases' structures outside raid hours is forbidden.

groups.title: Building rules
rules: Don't stack fences, doors or towers (there must be enough room for a player to pass).
Don't build un-raidable bases (blocking access with poles or other objects).
Building towers over 3 floors is forbidden.

groups.title: Conduct
rules: Respect between players and toward the staff, in and out of the game.
Racism, insults and any abusive behaviour are forbidden: may result in a permanent ban.
Spamming other servers in the channels or via DM to members is forbidden.

rules.scheduleNote: You can only raid within these windows. Outside of them, dismantling other bases' structures is forbidden.
rules.reportText: Report cheaters, toxic behaviour or bugs by opening a ticket on our Discord. The staff acts fast.

wiki.subtitle: Everything you need to master Livonia: how to connect, the loot zones, the key system and the legendary Livonia Run step by step.
wiki.s1desc: Vanilla+ first-person (1PP) server with {slots} slots on the Livonia map. Copy the IP, open it in the DayZ client browser and connect.
s1steps: Open DayZ and go to the community servers tab.
Paste the IP and port into the search by IP address.
Install the mods if the client asks (automatic download).
Connect, create your character and... survive.
wiki.s2desc: Each color marks a loot tier. The higher the tier, the better the gear… and the greater the danger.
wiki.s2callout: Want to plan your route? Open the interactive Livonia map with all the locations, loot and zones.
wiki.s3desc: Three keys open three containers scattered across the map. Each one is obtained from a different source.

keys.name: Yellow Key
keys.opens: Yellow container (industrial areas of Nadbor and Topolin)

keys.name: Blue Key
keys.loot: Items needed for the Livonia Run
keys.source: Inside the briefcase in the Dambog bunker

wiki.s4desc: The ultimate goal: reach the final bunker and claim the server's most coveted weapons. Follow the steps.

runSteps.title: Get the briefcase key
runSteps.text: Obtained by looting the official zombies' inventory. It has a low drop rate, so pack some patience.

runSteps.title: Find the briefcase
runSteps.text: The briefcase always appears in the Dambog bunker, southwest of the map.

runSteps.title: Enter the Dambog bunker
runSteps.text: You need the punched card found in the Radunin contaminated zone. This card has two uses.

runSteps.title: Open the Blue container
runSteps.text: The briefcase gives you the blue container key (at the Airfield). Inside you'll find a teddy bear with the white card and the heater.

runSteps.title: Reach the final bunker
runSteps.text: It's in the Livonia mine. To enter you need the punched card and the white access card.

runSteps.title: Start the generator
runSteps.text: Inside, find the generator room. Refuel it with diesel, insert the heater and start it up.

runSteps.title: Open the missile room
runSteps.text: Next to the generator there's a lever panel (A1-A4) that opens and closes the doors to the missile rooms. The weapons are in one of them.

wiki.s5desc: The server includes a base-building addon with fortifications and MMG Base Storage. Here are the building guides.

crafts.name: Palisade
crafts.text: Basic perimeter defense to protect your base from prying eyes and unwanted access.

crafts.name: Fortification
crafts.text: Advanced defensive structure to withstand raids. Level it up and hold the line.

wiki.ctaText: All the extended info, screenshots and the community to lend you a hand are on our Discord.
